head.hi: Memorandum by Mr. J. Darnel Hanley, Division of Foreign Activity Correlation

div.p: The FBI just informed me that word has been received that the Court and Judge have decided that because the PQZ Case involves certain military personnel the Court is consequently without jurisdiction.
The PQZ Case is reported to have been reassigned to a Military Court.
There is no information available to indicate whether or not this is a desirable move.
